identification.title: File Identification
identification.description: Settings for identifying and matching files within the archive.

useCodeFinder.title: Use Code Finder
useCodeFinder.description: Enable regular expression-based inline code detection in extracted text.

codeFinderRules.title: Code Finder Rules
codeFinderRules.description: Regular expressions in #v1 format defining patterns to treat as inline codes.

useCodeFinder.title: Use Code Finder
useCodeFinder.description: Enable regular expression-based inline code detection in extracted text.

codeFinderRules.title: Code Finder Rules
codeFinderRules.description: Regular expression rules in Okapi #v1 format for identifying inline codes.

escapeCharacters.title: Escape Characters as Entities
escapeCharacters.description: Characters to output as HTML named character entity references.

inlineCdata.title: Inline CDATA
inlineCdata.description: Treat CDATA sections as inline elements instead of breaking text flow.

quoteModeDefined.title: Custom Quote Mode Enabled
quoteModeDefined.description: Enable the custom quoteMode setting for quote/apostrophe escaping.

quoteMode.title: Quote Escape Mode
quoteMode.description: Controls how quote and apostrophe characters are escaped in output.

cleanupHtml.title: Clean Up HTML
cleanupHtml.description: Automatically fix common HTML syntax errors such as unquoted attributes.

path.title: ITS Parameters File
path.description: Path to an ITS 2.0 rules document that overrides the default HTML5 processing behavior

maxAttributeSize.title: Maximum Attribute Size
maxAttributeSize.description: Size in MB for the attribute buffer (default 4 MB).

specialCharacterPattern.title: Special Character Pattern
specialCharacterPattern.description: Pattern matching characters treated as inline codes.

untagXmlStructures.title: Untag XML Structures
untagXmlStructures.description: Skip embedded XML structural information when extracting.

mergeAdjacentCodes.title: Merge Adjacent Codes
mergeAdjacentCodes.description: Merge consecutive inline codes into a single code.

extractNotes.title: Extract Notes
extractNotes.description: Extract the content of Note elements.

extractMasterSpreads.title: Extract Master Spreads
extractMasterSpreads.description: Extract content from master spreads if they exist.

extractHiddenLayers.title: Extract Hidden Layers
extractHiddenLayers.description: Include hidden layers in the extraction.

extractHiddenPasteboardItems.title: Extract Hidden Pasteboard Items
extractHiddenPasteboardItems.description: Include hidden pasteboard items in the extraction.

skipDiscretionaryHyphens.title: Skip Discretionary Hyphens
skipDiscretionaryHyphens.description: Omit discretionary (soft) hyphens from extracted text.

extractBreaksInline.title: Extract Breaks Inline
extractBreaksInline.description: Treat break elements as inline codes within text units.

extractHyperlinkTextSourcesInline.title: Extract Hyperlink Sources Inline
extractHyperlinkTextSourcesInline.description: Extract hyperlink text sources as inline elements.

extractCustomTextVariables.title: Extract Custom Text Variables
extractCustomTextVariables.description: Include custom text variables in the extraction.

extractIndexTopics.title: Extract Index Topics
extractIndexTopics.description: Include index topic entries in the extraction.

extractExternalHyperlinks.title: Extract External Hyperlinks
extractExternalHyperlinks.description: Extract external hyperlink URLs for translation.

extractMathZones.title: Extract Math Zones
extractMathZones.description: Include math zone content in the extraction.

excludedStyles.title: Excluded Styles
excludedStyles.description: Styles whose content is excluded from extraction.

ignoreCharacterKerning.title: Ignore Character Kerning
ignoreCharacterKerning.description: Prevent kerning differences from creating separate inline codes.

ignoreCharacterTracking.title: Ignore Character Tracking
ignoreCharacterTracking.description: Prevent tracking differences from creating separate inline codes.

ignoreCharacterLeading.title: Ignore Character Leading
ignoreCharacterLeading.description: Prevent leading differences from creating separate inline codes.

ignoreCharacterBaselineShift.title: Ignore Character Baseline Shift
ignoreCharacterBaselineShift.description: Prevent baseline shift differences from creating separate inline codes.

maxwidthSizeUnit.title: Max Width Size Unit
maxwidthSizeUnit.description: The size-unit attribute value used for XLIFF length restriction elements.

translateUrls.title: Translate Hyperlink URLs
translateUrls.description: Extract URLs in link and image statements as translatable subflows.

urlToTranslatePattern.title: Translatable URL Pattern
urlToTranslatePattern.description: Regex pattern to filter which URLs are extracted when URL translation is enabled.

translateCodeBlocks.title: Translate Fenced Code Blocks
translateCodeBlocks.description: Expose contents of fenced code blocks for translation.

translateIndentedCodeBlocks.title: Translate Indented Code Blocks
translateIndentedCodeBlocks.description: Expose contents of indented code blocks for translation.

translateInlineCodeBlocks.title: Translate Inline Code Blocks
translateInlineCodeBlocks.description: Expose contents of backtick-delimited inline code for translation.

translateImageAltText.title: Translate Image Alt Text
translateImageAltText.description: Extract image alt text from Markdown and HTML img tags for translation.

generateHeaderAnchors.title: Generate Header Anchors
generateHeaderAnchors.description: Automatically generate named anchors for headings to preserve link targets.

parseMdx.title: Parse MDX Expressions
parseMdx.description: Parse out multi-line MDX export blocks as non-translatable skeleton.

htmlEntitesToEscape.title: HTML Entities to Escape
htmlEntitesToEscape.description: Characters to encode as HTML entities on export.

unescapeBackslashCharacters.title: Support Backslash Escaping
unescapeBackslashCharacters.description: Parse backslash-escaped punctuation in source documents.

charactersToEscape.title: Characters to Escape
charactersToEscape.description: Punctuation characters to backslash-escape on export.

htmlSubfilter.title: HTML Subfilter Configuration
htmlSubfilter.description: Custom HTML filter configuration ID for processing HTML within Markdown.

yamlSubfilter.title: YAML Subfilter Configuration
yamlSubfilter.description: Custom YAML filter configuration ID for processing YAML metadata headers.

nonTranslateBlocks.title: Non-Translatable Block Quotes
nonTranslateBlocks.description: Comma-separated prefixes identifying block quotes to exclude from translation.

useCodeFinder.title: Use Code Finder
useCodeFinder.description: Enable the Inline Code Finder for identifying inline codes in translatable text.

addPluralForms.title: Add Plural Forms
addPluralForms.description: Add missing plural forms based on the target locale's CLDR plural rules.

normalize.title: Normalize Variants
normalize.description: Move leading and trailing text into each complex argument variant for complete phrases.

prettyPrint.title: Pretty Print
prettyPrint.description: Format output with indentation and line breaks for readability.

extractVariables.title: Extract Variables
extractVariables.description: Extract the definitions of FrameMaker variables for translation.

extractIndexMarkers.title: Extract Index Markers
extractIndexMarkers.description: Extract index marker text from extractable pages as separate text units.

extractLinks.title: Extract Links
extractLinks.description: Extract hypertext link URLs from extractable pages as separate text units.

extractBodyPages.title: Body Pages
extractBodyPages.description: Extract translatable text from body pages.

extractHiddenPages.title: Hidden Pages
extractHiddenPages.description: Extract translatable text from hidden pages.

extractMasterPages.title: Master Pages
extractMasterPages.description: Extract translatable text from master pages.

extractReferencePages.title: Reference Pages
extractReferencePages.description: Extract translatable text from reference pages.

useCodeFinder.title: Use Inline Code Rules
useCodeFinder.description: Apply regular expressions to convert matched text patterns into inline codes.

extractNotes.title: Extract Notes
extractNotes.description: Extract the content of annotation elements as translatable text

extractReferences.title: Extract References
extractReferences.description: Extract the content of bookmark reference elements as translatable text

encodeCharEntityReferenceGlyphs.title: Encode Character Entity Reference Glyphs
encodeCharEntityReferenceGlyphs.description: Encode special glyphs as character entity references in the output

ignoreWhitespaceStyles.title: Ignore Whitespace Styles
ignoreWhitespaceStyles.description: Ignore whitespace character formatting and treat it as equivalent to consequential styles during aggressive tag cleanup.

preserveAsciiAndHighAnsiFontCategoriesOn.title: Preserve Font Categories on Detection
preserveAsciiAndHighAnsiFontCategoriesOn.description: Preserve ASCII and HighAnsi run font categories when merging consequential runs.

removeEmbeddedExcel.title: Remove Embedded Excel Package
removeEmbeddedExcel.description: Remove the embedded Excel data package and its references from chart parts when extracting cached chart values.

translateWordGraphicName.title: Translate Word Graphic Names
translateWordGraphicName.description: Expose @name attributes of drawings and word art in Word documents for translation.

translateWordGraphicDescription.title: Translate Word Graphic Descriptions
translateWordGraphicDescription.description: Expose @descr attributes of drawings and word art in Word documents for translation.

translatePowerpointGraphicName.title: Translate PowerPoint Graphic Names
translatePowerpointGraphicName.description: Expose @name attributes of drawings and word art in PowerPoint presentations for translation.

translatePowerpointGraphicDescription.title: Translate PowerPoint Graphic Descriptions
translatePowerpointGraphicDescription.description: Expose @descr attributes of drawings and word art in PowerPoint presentations for translation.

translatePowerpointCachedChartStrings.title: Translate Cached Chart Strings
translatePowerpointCachedChartStrings.description: Expose pre-rendered chart string values stored in PowerPoint chart XML for translation.

translatePowerpointCachedChartNumbers.title: Translate Cached Chart Numbers
translatePowerpointCachedChartNumbers.description: Expose cached chart numbers and format codes in PowerPoint for translation.

treatExcelSourceColumnStylesForExclusion.title: Apply Source Column Styles for Exclusion
treatExcelSourceColumnStylesForExclusion.description: Use source column cell styles when evaluating color-based exclusion rules in Excel.

extractExcelSourceAndTargetColumnsJoined.title: Join Source and Target Columns
extractExcelSourceAndTargetColumnsJoined.description: Join source and target columns in a row during extraction rather than extracting them separately.

extractExcelWorksheetsExplicitlySpecifie.title: Extract Only Specified Worksheets
extractExcelWorksheetsExplicitlySpecifie.description: Only extract worksheets whose names match patterns defined in the Worksheet Configurations.

extractExcelCellsExplicitlySpecified.title: Extract Only Specified Cells
extractExcelCellsExplicitlySpecified.description: Only extract cells explicitly specified in the Worksheet Configurations.

inlineCodes.mergeAdjacent.title: Merge Adjacent Codes
inlineCodes.mergeAdjacent.description: Merge consecutive inline codes into a single placeholder to simplify translatable segments.

inlineCodes.moveBoundaryCodes.title: Move Boundary Codes to Skeleton
inlineCodes.moveBoundaryCodes.description: Move inline codes at segment boundaries out of the translatable text into the non-translatable skeleton.

useLd.title: Use Localization Directives
useLd.description: Enable recognition of localization directives in comments to override default extraction behavior.

localizeOutside.title: Extract Outside Directives
localizeOutside.description: Extract translatable items that are not within the scope of a localization directive.

useKeyCondition.title: Enable Key Condition
useKeyCondition.description: Filter entries for extraction based on a regex condition applied to their keys.

extractOnlyMatchingKey.title: Extract Only Matching Keys
extractOnlyMatchingKey.description: When enabled, extract only entries whose keys match the condition; otherwise exclude matching keys.

keyCondition.title: Key Condition Pattern
keyCondition.description: Regular expression pattern to test against property keys for extraction filtering.

extraComments.title: Additional Comment Markers
extraComments.description: Recognize semicolon and double-slash comment styles in addition to standard # and ! markers.

commentsAreNotes.title: Comments as Notes
commentsAreNotes.description: Attach preceding comments to each entry as translator notes.

idLikeResname.title: Use Key as Text Unit ID
idLikeResname.description: Use the property key value as the text unit ID in addition to the resource name.

escapeExtendedChars.title: Escape Extended Characters
escapeExtendedChars.description: Convert all characters above U+007F to \uHHHH escape sequences in the output.

useJavaEscapes.title: Retain Java Escapes
useJavaEscapes.description: Keep Java property escape sequences in extracted text instead of resolving them.

convertLFandTab.title: Convert \n and \t
convertLFandTab.description: Convert \n and \t escape sequences to actual line-breaks and tabs during processing.

openManifestBeforeProcessing.title: Open Manifest Before Processing
openManifestBeforeProcessing.description: Open the manifest file for review or modification before processing the translation kit.

preserveWhiteSpaces.title: Preserve White Spaces
preserveWhiteSpaces.description: Preserve all white spaces in extracted text instead of collapsing and trimming them.

hasInlineCodes.title: Has Inline Codes
hasInlineCodes.description: Enable conversion of text patterns into inline codes.

autoCloseSection.title: Auto-Close Sections
autoCloseSection.description: Automatically close the previous section when a new one starts.

dotAll.title: Dot Matches Line-Feed
dotAll.description: Enable the dot operator to match line-feed characters.

multiLine.title: Multi-Line Mode
multiLine.description: Make ^ and $ match at line terminators, not just start and end of input.

ignoreCase.title: Ignore Case
ignoreCase.description: Ignore letter case differences when matching patterns.

useLocDir.title: Use Localization Directives
useLocDir.description: Recognize and process localization directives in the input.

extractOutsideLocDir.title: Extract Outside Directives
extractOutsideLocDir.description: Extract translatable items that are not within the scope of a localization directive.

startString.title: Beginning of String
startString.description: Character(s) marking the start of a string for string extraction.

endString.title: End of String
endString.description: Character(s) marking the end of a string for string extraction.

useBackSlashEscape.title: Backslash Escape
useBackSlashEscape.description: Use backslash prefix to escape characters in strings.

useDoubleCharEscape.title: Double Character Escape
useDoubleCharEscape.description: Use character doubling to escape characters in strings.

mimeType.title: Document MIME Type
mimeType.description: MIME type used to identify the document format during extraction.

rules.title: Extraction Rules
rules.description: Ordered list of regex-based rules with actions and capturing group assignments.

filterConfigurationId.title: Filter Configuration ID
filterConfigurationId.description: The configuration ID of the internal filter to wrap (e.g., okf_xmlstream, okf_html).

simplifyResources.title: Simplify Resources
simplifyResources.description: Flatten resources by removing references, making them standalone text units.

simplifyCodes.title: Simplify Codes
simplifyCodes.description: Merge adjacent inline codes and move leading/trailing codes to skeleton.

simplifierRules.title: Simplifier Rules
simplifierRules.description: Rules for simplifying inline code representation in extracted segments

readAllTargets.title: Read All Target Entries
readAllTargets.description: Read all target <tuv> elements into the text unit instead of only the selected target.

consolidateDpSkeleton.title: Consolidate Document Part Skeleton
consolidateDpSkeleton.description: Group all document part skeleton into a single resource to reduce pipeline events.

exitOnInvalidTu.title: Exit on Invalid TUs
exitOnInvalidTu.description: Stop processing when encountering invalid <tu> elements instead of skipping them.

segmentationType.title: Segment Creation Mode
segmentationType.description: Controls whether and when segments are created for extracted <tu> entries based on segtype.

escapeGt.title: Escape Greater-Than Characters
escapeGt.description: Escape all > characters as > in the output.

duplicatePropertyValueSeparator.title: Duplicate Property Separator
duplicatePropertyValueSeparator.description: String used to separate values when duplicate TMX properties are found.

openProjectFile.title: Open Project File Before Processing
openProjectFile.description: Opens the .txp project file in an editor dialog before processing, allowing resource selection and settings review.

host.title: Host URL
host.description: The URL of the Transifex server where the project is hosted.

password.title: Password
password.description: Password for the Transifex user account.

projectId.title: Project ID
projectId.description: The identifier of the Transifex project to work with.

protectApproved.title: Protect Approved Entries
protectApproved.description: Marks non-empty, non-fuzzy entries as non-translatable to protect approved translations.

sourceLocale.title: Source Locale
sourceLocale.description: Fall-back source locale code used when not specified by the calling application.

targetLocale.title: Target Locale
targetLocale.description: Fall-back target locale code used when not specified by the calling application.

convertByteValues.title: Convert Byte Elements
convertByteValues.description: Convert <byte value="[value]"/> elements to raw characters instead of treating them as inline codes.

useCodeFinder.title: Has Inline Codes
useCodeFinder.description: Enable pattern-based inline code detection using the defined regular expressions.

extractionMode.title: Extraction Mode
extractionMode.description: Controls how existing segments affect text extraction — auto-detect, existing only, or extract all.

escapeGT.title: Escape Greater-Than Characters
escapeGT.description: Escape all > characters as > in the output.

allowEmptyOutputTarget.title: Allow Empty Target Segments
allowEmptyOutputTarget.description: Allow empty translations to be written as-is in output; when disabled, source text is copied into empty targets.

elementNames.title: Attribute Elements to Extract
elementNames.description: Comma-separated list of name attribute values for the <attribute> elements to extract.

filterConfigurations.title: Filter Configurations
filterConfigurations.description: Comma-separated list of filter configurations corresponding to each extractable element.

monolingual.title: Monolingual Mode
monolingual.description: Process all importContentInstance elements without requiring source/target pairing.

sourceIdName.title: Source ID Element Name
sourceIdName.description: Name attribute value of the element containing the source ID that pairs source and target blocks.

localeIdName.title: Locale ID Element Name
localeIdName.description: Name attribute value of the element containing the locale identifier for a content block.

preserveWhitespace.title: Preserve Whitespace
preserveWhitespace.description: Prevents collapsing of consecutive whitespace characters in extracted text.

customCodes.title: Custom Inline Codes
customCodes.description: Defines custom regex patterns to be treated as inline codes during extraction.

xtmAttributes.title: XTM Attributes
xtmAttributes.description: Process XTM-specific attributes in the XLIFF document.

maxValidation.title: Maximum Validation
maxValidation.description: Perform maximum validation of the XLIFF 2.x format when parsing.

needsSegmentation.title: Needs Segmentation
needsSegmentation.description: Resegment units marked with canSegment="yes" that do not already have a target.

editorTitle.title: Editor Title
editorTitle.description: Title displayed in the parameters editor UI

taggedConfig.title: Tagged Configuration
taggedConfig.description: Internal parsed configuration object for element and attribute rules

path.title: Configuration File Path
path.description: Path to an external YAML configuration file

extraction.excludeKeys.title: Key Exception Pattern
extraction.excludeKeys.description: Regular expression for keys that behave opposite to the default extraction mode.

extraction.includeIsolatedStrings.title: Extract Isolated Strings
extraction.includeIsolatedStrings.description: Extract string values that are not directly associated with a key.

output.subFilterProcessLiteralAsBlock.title: Sub-filter Literal Blocks
output.subFilterProcessLiteralAsBlock.description: Process YAML literal block scalars through the configured sub-filter.

removeBOM.title: Remove BOM If Present
removeBOM.description: Remove the Byte-Order-Mark from input files if detected; when disabled, adds a BOM if not already present.

alsoNonUTF8.title: Remove UTF-16 BOMs Also
alsoNonUTF8.description: Also remove the BOM from UTF-16 files, not just UTF-8.

markAsMT.description: Marks generated TM entries as machine translation by setting creationId to "MT!"

makeTM.description: Imports translated entries into a Pensieve TM, creating it if necessary

makeTMX.description: Creates a TMX document with all translated entries across all input documents

sendTMX.description: Sends the generated TMX document to the next step instead of the original input document

checkExistingTm.description: Skips entries that already have translations in an existing Pensieve TM

segment.description: Segments text units into sentences using SRX rules before translation

autoOpen.description: Automatically open the result file in the default editor after processing completes.

countInBatch.description: Add character count annotation aggregated per batch

countInBatchItems.description: Add character count annotation for each batch item

countInDocuments.description: Add character count annotation for each document

countInSubDocuments.description: Add character count annotation for each sub-document

countInGroups.description: Add character count annotation for each group

bufferSize.description: Size of the internal text buffer used during counting (0 for default)

normalizeQuotes.description: Replace all quotation marks with straight double quotes and apostrophes with single straight quotes.

checkCharacters.description: Detect and remove text units containing common corrupt character strings.

matchRegexExpressions.description: Mark segments matching built-in regular expressions for removal. This option is not currently used.

matchUserRegex.description: Remove text units containing text that matches user-defined regular expressions.

pruneTextUnit.description: Remove text units marked for removal or that have no target text.

normalizePunctuations.description: Standardize spaces around punctuation marks to English writing style conventions.

keepCrNlIntact.description: Preserve CR and NL characters instead of normalizing them to spaces.

stripSource.description: Apply the selected removal action to the source text of each text unit

stripTarget.description: Apply the selected removal action to the target text of each text unit

includeNonTranslatable.description: Apply the removal action even to text units marked as non-translatable

replaceWithSpace.description: Replace line-break inline codes with spaces instead of removing them entirely (only when removing both marker and content)

copyContent.description: Copy the source text into the newly created target container.

copyProperties.description: Copy the source properties (metadata) into the created target.

overwriteExisting.description: Overwrite existing target content and/or properties with source values.

createOnNonTranslatable.description: Create a target container even for non-translatable text units.

desegmentSource.description: Joins all segments of each source text unit into a single content.

desegmentTarget.description: Joins all segments of each target text unit into a single content, if a target exists.

renumberCodes.description: Restores original code IDs that were renumbered during segmentation.

unescapeNCR.title: Unescape Numeric Character References
unescapeNCR.description: Un-escape numeric character references (e.g., á) when reading the input document.

unescapeCER.title: Unescape Character Entity References
unescapeCER.description: Un-escape HTML character entity references (e.g., á) when reading the input document.

unescapeJava.title: Unescape Java-style Notation
unescapeJava.description: Un-escape Java-style \uXXXX escape sequences when reading the input document.

escapeAll.title: Escape All Extended Characters
escapeAll.description: Escape all extended (non-ASCII) characters, not just those unsupported by the output encoding.

escapeNotation.title: Escape Notation
escapeNotation.description: Select the notation format used when escaping characters in the output (NCR, CER, Java-style, or user-defined).

userFormat.title: User-Defined Format
userFormat.description: Java format expression (e.g., %d, %x) used for escaping when user-defined notation is selected.

useBytes.title: Use Byte Values
useBytes.description: Use byte values of the output encoding instead of Unicode code points in the user-defined format.

BOMonUTF8.title: BOM on UTF-8 Output
BOMonUTF8.description: Add a Byte-Order-Mark (BOM) at the beginning of UTF-8 output files.

reportUnsupported.title: Report Unsupported Characters
reportUnsupported.description: Log all characters not supported by the output encoding.

baseUrl.description: Endpoint URL of the Enrycher Web service to use for disambiguation annotations

compareSkeleton.title: Compare Skeleton
compareSkeleton.description: Include skeleton (non-extractable) parts of events in the verification comparison.

stepEnabled.title: Perform Extraction Verification
stepEnabled.description: Enable or disable the verification step; when disabled, the document passes through unmodified.

allEvents.title: Verify All Events
allEvents.description: Compare all filter events between extractions, not just text units.

limit.title: Maximum Warnings Per Document
limit.description: Maximum number of verification warnings allowed per document before stopping or moving on.

interrupt.title: Interrupt on Warning Limit
interrupt.description: Stop the pipeline when the maximum number of warnings is reached for a document.

writerClass.title: Package Format
writerClass.description: Java class of the package writer that determines the translation kit output format (e.g., XLIFF, PO, OmegaT).

packageName.title: Package Name
packageName.description: Name of the package directory to create inside the output root.

packageDirectory.title: Output Root Directory
packageDirectory.description: Root directory where the translation package will be created; supports ${inputRootDir} and locale variables.

supportFiles.title: Support Material Files
supportFiles.description: Additional files to include in the package as support material for translators.

message.title: Package Message
message.description: Optional message or instructions to include with the translation package.

outputManifest.title: Output Manifest
outputManifest.description: Generate a manifest file required for merging the translated kit back into the original format.

createZip.title: Create ZIP Package
createZip.description: Create a ZIP archive (.rkp) of the generated translation package.

sendOutput.title: Send Output to Next Step
sendOutput.description: Send prepared files as raw documents to the next pipeline step instead of the original filter events.

singleOutput.title: Single Output Document
singleOutput.description: Generates one combined output document for all input documents instead of one per input

autoExtensions.title: Append Format Extension
autoExtensions.description: Output paths are the input paths with the new format extension appended (e.g., .tmx, .po)

useGenericCodes.title: Generic Inline Codes
useGenericCodes.description: Replaces original inline codes with generic placeholders like <N>, </N>, and <N/>

skipEntriesWithoutText.title: Skip Empty Entries
skipEntriesWithoutText.description: Suppresses output of entries that contain no text (empty or inline-codes only)

approvedEntriesOnly.title: Approved Entries Only
approvedEntriesOnly.description: Restricts output to entries with the target approved property set to yes

overwriteSameSource.title: Overwrite Same Source
overwriteSameSource.description: For Pensieve TM output, replaces existing entries when the source text matches

toHalfWidth.title: Convert to Half-Width
toHalfWidth.description: Convert full-width characters to half-width or ASCII equivalents; when false, converts in the opposite direction.

asciiOnly.title: ASCII Only
asciiOnly.description: When converting to full-width, restrict conversion to ASCII characters only.

katakanaOnly.title: Katakana Only
katakanaOnly.description: When converting to full-width, restrict conversion to Japanese Katakana and associated punctuation only.

includeSLA.title: Include Squared Latin Abbreviations
includeSLA.description: Also convert Squared Latin Abbreviations from the CJK Compatibility block to non-CJK character sequences.

includeLLS.title: Include Letter-Like Symbols
includeLLS.description: Also convert characters from the Letter-Like Symbols block to character sequences.

includeKatakana.title: Include Katakana
includeKatakana.description: Also convert Japanese Katakana and associated punctuation to half-width forms.

normalizeOutput.title: Normalize Output (NFC)
normalizeOutput.description: Apply Unicode NFC normalization to the output text after conversions.

markAsTranslateNo.description: When enabled, matched text units in the destination file are marked as non-translatable after the reference text is copied.

markAsApproved.description: When enabled, the 'approved' property of matched target entries is set to 'yes' after copying.

makeGray.description: Convert the image colors into a set of grays.

checkInconststencies.title: Check Inconsistencies
checkInconststencies.description: Enable or disable inconsistency checking; allows the step to be toggled off without removing it from the pipeline.

checkPerFile.title: Per-File Checking
checkPerFile.description: Process each input file individually instead of comparing segments across all documents, reducing memory usage.

outputPath.title: Report File Path
outputPath.description: Full path of the XML report file to generate; supports ${rootDir} and ${inputRootDir} variables.

displayOption.title: Inline Code Display
displayOption.description: Controls how inline codes are represented in the report: original codes, generic markers, or plain text.

autoOpen.title: Auto-Open Report
autoOpen.description: Automatically open the generated report file in the default application after processing completes.

leverage.title: Leverage Text Units
leverage.description: Enable leveraging of text units with existing translations.

resourceClassName.title: Translation Resource
resourceClassName.description: Java class name of the translation resource connector (TM or MT engine).

noQueryThreshold.title: No-Query Threshold
noQueryThreshold.description: Skip query if an existing candidate scores at or above this value (101 = always query).

threshold.title: Minimum Match Score
threshold.description: Accept only matches with a score equal to or above this threshold.

fillTarget.title: Fill Target with Translation
fillTarget.description: Copy the best translation candidate into the target content.

fillTargetThreshold.title: Fill Target Threshold
fillTargetThreshold.description: Minimum match score required to copy the best candidate into the target.

fillIfTargetIsEmpty.title: Only If Target Is Empty
fillIfTargetIsEmpty.description: Fill the target only when it has no existing content.

fillIfTargetIsSameAsSource.title: Also If Target Equals Source
fillIfTargetIsSameAsSource.description: Also fill the target when its content is identical to the source.

downgradeIdenticalBestMatches.title: Downgrade Identical Exact Matches
downgradeIdenticalBestMatches.description: Reduce score by 1% when multiple identical exact matches are returned.

makeTMX.title: Generate TMX Document
makeTMX.description: Create a TMX file with all leveraged matches.

tmxPath.title: TMX Output Path
tmxPath.description: File path for the generated TMX document.

useMTPrefix.title: Add MT Prefix to Source
useMTPrefix.description: Add an MT-specific prefix to the source text for MT-origin entries.

useTargetPrefix.title: Add Prefix to Translation
useTargetPrefix.description: Add a prefix to leveraged translations based on match score.

targetPrefix.title: Target Prefix Text
targetPrefix.description: Prefix string to prepend to leveraged translations.

targetPrefixThreshold.title: Prefix Score Threshold
targetPrefixThreshold.description: Add the prefix when the match score is equal to or below this value.

copySourceOnNoText.title: Copy Source If No Text
copySourceOnNoText.description: Copy source into target when the source has no translatable text.

markAsMT.description: Marks generated TM entries with a machine translation origin indicator (e.g., creationId="MT!")

makeTmx.description: Creates a TMX translation memory document from the translation results

annotate.description: Adds translation match annotations to text units for use by subsequent steps

fillTarget.description: Copies the best-scoring translation candidate into empty target segments

onlyWhenWithoutCandidate.description: Sends only text units without existing translation candidates to the MT engine

sendTmx.description: Passes the generated TMX document as input to the next pipeline step instead of filter events

useTargetPrefix.description: Prepends a prefix string to translation candidates copied into the target

preserveWhitespace.description: Preserve whitespace from the original content during merging

preserveSegmentation.description: Restore segmentation in text units for use by subsequent pipeline steps

returnRawDocument.description: Send raw document events instead of filter events to downstream steps

forceTargetLocale.description: Use the target locale from the pipeline instead of the manifest file

overrideOutputPath.description: Directory for merged output; leave empty to use the manifest default

copyCodeMetadata.description: Copy inline code metadata from the original file to the merged output

includeTextContainers.title: Include Text Containers
includeTextContainers.description: Include non-segment text parts (inter-segment content) in quality checks.

useGenericCodes.title: Use Generic Codes
useGenericCodes.description: Replace specific inline code content with generic placeholders before comparison.

outputPath.title: Report Output Path
outputPath.description: Path of the HTML report file to generate.

outputType.title: Report Output Type
outputType.description: Format of the generated quality check report.

autoOpen.title: Open Report After Completion
autoOpen.description: Automatically open the report file after processing.

emptySource.title: Check Empty Source
emptySource.description: Flag segments where the source is empty but the target is not.

targetSameAsSource.title: Check Target Same as Source
targetSameAsSource.description: Flag segments where the target translation is identical to the source.

targetSameAsSourceForSameLanguage.title: Check Same-as-Source for Same Language
targetSameAsSourceForSameLanguage.description: Apply the target-same-as-source check even when source and target languages match.

targetSameAsSourceWithCodes.title: Include Codes in Comparison
targetSameAsSourceWithCodes.description: Include inline codes when comparing source and target for identity.

targetSameAsSourceWithNumbers.title: Include Numbers in Comparison
targetSameAsSourceWithNumbers.description: Include numeric values when comparing source and target for identity.

codeDifference.title: Check Code Differences
codeDifference.description: Verify that target segments have the same inline codes as source segments.

guessOpenClose.title: Guess Open/Close Codes
guessOpenClose.description: Infer whether inline codes are opening or closing when not explicitly marked.

strictCodeOrder.title: Strict Code Order
strictCodeOrder.description: Also flag code differences when codes appear in a different order.

checkXliffSchema.title: Validate XLIFF Schema
checkXliffSchema.description: Validate input against an XLIFF schema.

xliffSchemaType.title: XLIFF Schema Type
xliffSchemaType.description: XLIFF schema validation level: Transitional or Strict.

checkPatterns.title: Check Patterns
checkPatterns.description: Verify that source patterns have expected corresponding content in the target.

checkWithLT.title: Check with LanguageTool
checkWithLT.description: Run additional grammar/style checks using a LanguageTool server.

serverURL.title: LanguageTool Server URL
serverURL.description: URL of the LanguageTool server instance.

ltBilingualMode.title: Bilingual Mode
ltBilingualMode.description: Auto-translate LanguageTool error messages into another language.

saveSession.title: Save Session
saveSession.description: Save the QA session to a file for later review in CheckMate.

sessionPath.title: Session File Path
sessionPath.description: Path for the saved QA session file.

doubledWord.title: Check Doubled Words
doubledWord.description: Flag target segments with consecutive repeated words.

doubledWordExceptions.title: Doubled Word Exceptions
doubledWordExceptions.description: Semicolon-separated words allowed to be repeated.

corruptedCharacters.title: Check Corrupted Characters
corruptedCharacters.description: Detect patterns indicating encoding corruption in target text.

scope.title: Processing Scope
scope.description: Which entries to process: all, approved only, or non-approved only.

checkMaxCharLength.title: Check Maximum Length
checkMaxCharLength.description: Flag targets longer than a percentage of source character length.

maxCharLengthBreak.title: Max Length Short Text %
maxCharLengthBreak.description: Maximum length percentage for short text.

maxCharLengthAbove.title: Max Length Short/Long Threshold
maxCharLengthAbove.description: Character count above which text is considered long for max length check.

maxCharLengthBelow.title: Max Length Long Text %
maxCharLengthBelow.description: Maximum length percentage for long text.

checkMinCharLength.title: Check Minimum Length
checkMinCharLength.description: Flag targets shorter than a percentage of source character length.

minCharLengthBreak.title: Min Length Short Text %
minCharLengthBreak.description: Minimum length percentage for short text.

minCharLengthAbove.title: Min Length Short/Long Threshold
minCharLengthAbove.description: Character count above which text is considered long for min length check.

minCharLengthBelow.title: Min Length Long Text %
minCharLengthBelow.description: Minimum length percentage for long text.

checkStorageSize.title: Check Storage Size
checkStorageSize.description: Verify target fits within the storage size defined by the document format.

checkAbsoluteMaxCharLength.title: Check Absolute Max Length
checkAbsoluteMaxCharLength.description: Flag targets exceeding an absolute character count limit.

absoluteMaxCharLength.title: Absolute Max Characters
absoluteMaxCharLength.description: Maximum number of characters allowed in any target segment.

checkAllowedCharacters.title: Check Allowed Characters
checkAllowedCharacters.description: Enable character-level validation of target text.

checkCharacters.title: Check Against Charset
checkCharacters.description: Validate target characters against a specific charset encoding.

charset.title: Character Set Encoding
charset.description: Charset encoding to validate target text against.

extraCharsAllowed.title: Extra Allowed Characters
extraCharsAllowed.description: Regex matching additional characters to allow beyond the charset.

checkTerms.title: Check Terminology
checkTerms.description: Verify terminology using a glossary or termbase file.

termsPath.title: Termbase Path
termsPath.description: Path to the termbase file for terminology verification.

stringMode.title: String Match Mode
stringMode.description: Use string-based matching instead of word-boundary matching for terms.

betweenCodes.title: Check Between Codes Only
betweenCodes.description: Restrict terminology checking to text between inline codes.

showFullPath.title: Show Full File Path
showFullPath.description: Display full file paths in the report instead of filenames only.

checkBlacklist.title: Check Blacklist
checkBlacklist.description: Check target text against a list of forbidden terms.

allowBlacklistSub.title: Allow Substring Matching
allowBlacklistSub.description: Allow substring matches when checking blacklisted terms.

blacklistSrc.title: Check Source Blacklist
blacklistSrc.description: Also check the source text against the blacklist.

blacklistPath.title: Blacklist File Path
blacklistPath.description: Path to the file containing forbidden terms.

showOnlyPatternDescription.title: Show Pattern Description Only
showOnlyPatternDescription.description: Show only the pattern description in reports instead of full match details.

typesToIgnore.title: Code Types to Ignore
typesToIgnore.description: Semicolon-separated list of inline code types to skip during verification.

fromSourcePattern0.title: Pattern 0 Direction
fromSourcePattern0.description: Search source first then verify target (true) or vice versa (false).

singlePattern0.title: Pattern 0 Single Match
singlePattern0.description: Expect only a single occurrence for pattern #0.

severityPattern0.title: Pattern 0 Severity
severityPattern0.description: Warning severity level for pattern rule #0.

sourcePattern0.title: Pattern 0 Source Regex
sourcePattern0.description: Regular expression to match in source for pattern #0.

targetPattern0.title: Pattern 0 Target Regex
targetPattern0.description: Expected pattern in target for pattern #0, or <same>.

fromSourcePattern1.title: Pattern 1 Direction
fromSourcePattern1.description: Search source first then verify target (true) or vice versa (false).

singlePattern1.title: Pattern 1 Single Match
singlePattern1.description: Expect only a single occurrence for pattern #1.

severityPattern1.title: Pattern 1 Severity
severityPattern1.description: Warning severity level for pattern rule #1.

sourcePattern1.title: Pattern 1 Source Regex
sourcePattern1.description: Regular expression to match in source for pattern #1.

targetPattern1.title: Pattern 1 Target Regex
targetPattern1.description: Expected pattern in target for pattern #1, or <same>.

fromSourcePattern2.title: Pattern 2 Direction
fromSourcePattern2.description: Search source first then verify target (true) or vice versa (false).

singlePattern2.title: Pattern 2 Single Match
singlePattern2.description: Expect only a single occurrence for pattern #2.

severityPattern2.title: Pattern 2 Severity
severityPattern2.description: Warning severity level for pattern rule #2.

sourcePattern2.title: Pattern 2 Source Regex
sourcePattern2.description: Regular expression to match in source for pattern #2.

targetPattern2.title: Pattern 2 Target Regex
targetPattern2.description: Expected pattern in target for pattern #2, or <same>.

fromSourcePattern3.title: Pattern 3 Direction
fromSourcePattern3.description: Search source first then verify target (true) or vice versa (false).

singlePattern3.title: Pattern 3 Single Match
singlePattern3.description: Expect only a single occurrence for pattern #3.

severityPattern3.title: Pattern 3 Severity
severityPattern3.description: Warning severity level for pattern rule #3.

sourcePattern3.title: Pattern 3 Source Regex
sourcePattern3.description: Regular expression to match in source for pattern #3.

targetPattern3.title: Pattern 3 Target Regex
targetPattern3.description: Expected pattern in target for pattern #3, or <same>.

fromSourcePattern4.title: Pattern 4 Direction
fromSourcePattern4.description: Search source first then verify target (true) or vice versa (false).

singlePattern4.title: Pattern 4 Single Match
singlePattern4.description: Expect only a single occurrence for pattern #4.

severityPattern4.title: Pattern 4 Severity
severityPattern4.description: Warning severity level for pattern rule #4.

sourcePattern4.title: Pattern 4 Source Regex
sourcePattern4.description: Regular expression to match in source for pattern #4.

targetPattern4.title: Pattern 4 Target Regex
targetPattern4.description: Expected pattern in target for pattern #4, or <same>.

fromSourcePattern5.title: Pattern 5 Direction
fromSourcePattern5.description: Search source first then verify target (true) or vice versa (false).

singlePattern5.title: Pattern 5 Single Match
singlePattern5.description: Expect only a single occurrence for pattern #5.

severityPattern5.title: Pattern 5 Severity
severityPattern5.description: Warning severity level for pattern rule #5.

sourcePattern5.title: Pattern 5 Source Regex
sourcePattern5.description: Regular expression to match in source for pattern #5.

targetPattern5.title: Pattern 5 Target Regex
targetPattern5.description: Expected pattern in target for pattern #5, or <same>.

fromSourcePattern6.title: Pattern 6 Direction
fromSourcePattern6.description: Search source first then verify target (true) or vice versa (false).

singlePattern6.title: Pattern 6 Single Match
singlePattern6.description: Expect only a single occurrence for pattern #6.

severityPattern6.title: Pattern 6 Severity
severityPattern6.description: Warning severity level for pattern rule #6.

sourcePattern6.title: Pattern 6 Source Regex
sourcePattern6.description: Regular expression to match in source for pattern #6.

targetPattern6.title: Pattern 6 Target Regex
targetPattern6.description: Expected pattern in target for pattern #6, or <same>.

fromSourcePattern7.title: Pattern 7 Direction
fromSourcePattern7.description: Search source first then verify target (true) or vice versa (false).

singlePattern7.title: Pattern 7 Single Match
singlePattern7.description: Expect only a single occurrence for pattern #7.

severityPattern7.title: Pattern 7 Severity
severityPattern7.description: Warning severity level for pattern rule #7.

sourcePattern7.title: Pattern 7 Source Regex
sourcePattern7.description: Regular expression to match in source for pattern #7.

targetPattern7.title: Pattern 7 Target Regex
targetPattern7.description: Expected pattern in target for pattern #7, or <same>.

extraCodesAllowed.title: Extra Codes Allowed
extraCodesAllowed.description: Number of extra inline codes allowed in target without warning.

missingCodesAllowed.title: Missing Codes Allowed
missingCodesAllowed.description: Number of missing inline codes allowed from target without warning.

bomOnUTF8.description: Add a Byte-Order-Mark at the beginning of the file when the output encoding is UTF-8.

updateEncoding.description: Automatically update encoding declarations in XML and HTML output files to match the output encoding.

tusForTargetRemoval.title: Text Unit IDs for Removal
tusForTargetRemoval.description: Comma-delimited list of text unit IDs whose targets should be removed; empty removes all targets.

targetLocalesToKeep.title: Target Locales to Keep
targetLocalesToKeep.description: Comma-delimited list of target locales to preserve; targets with other locales are removed.

filterBasedOnIds.title: Filter by IDs
filterBasedOnIds.description: When true, filter text units by ID; when false, filter by target locale.

removeTUIfNoTarget.title: Remove Empty Text Units
removeTUIfNoTarget.description: Remove the text unit entirely if it has no remaining targets after removal.

regEx.title: Use Regular Expressions
regEx.description: Enable Java regular expression mode for all search patterns.

dotAll.title: Dot Also Matches Line-Feed
dotAll.description: Make the period character match every character including line-feed.

ignoreCase.title: Ignore Case Differences
ignoreCase.description: Ignore case when matching search patterns.

multiLine.title: Multiline Mode
multiLine.description: Make ^ and $ match at the beginning and end of each line.

target.title: Replace in Target Content
target.description: Perform search and replace on the target content of text units.

source.title: Replace in Source Content
source.description: Perform search and replace on the source content of text units.

replaceALL.title: Replace All Instances
replaceALL.description: Replace all matches found instead of only the first match.

replacementsPath.title: Replacements File Path
replacementsPath.description: Path to a tab-delimited UTF-8 file with search and replacement pairs.

logPath.title: Replacement Log File Path
logPath.description: Path where the log of performed replacements will be saved.

saveLog.title: Save Replacement Log
saveLog.description: Save a log of all replacements performed to the specified file.

segmentSource.title: Segment Source Text
segmentSource.description: Segment the source text of text units using SRX rules.

segmentTarget.title: Segment Target Text
segmentTarget.description: Segment existing target text using SRX rules for the processed locales.

renumberCodes.title: Renumber Code IDs
renumberCodes.description: Renumber inline code IDs in each segment to start at 1.

checkSegments.title: Verify Segment Alignment
checkSegments.description: Verify that target segments match source segments when target content exists.

trimSrcLeadingWS.title: Trim Source Leading Whitespace
trimSrcLeadingWS.description: Maximum leading whitespace characters to trim from source segments (-1 for default).

trimSrcTrailingWS.title: Trim Source Trailing Whitespace
trimSrcTrailingWS.description: Maximum trailing whitespace characters to trim from source segments (-1 for default).

trimTrgLeadingWS.title: Trim Target Leading Whitespace
trimTrgLeadingWS.description: Maximum leading whitespace characters to trim from target segments (-1 for default).

trimTrgTrailingWS.title: Trim Target Trailing Whitespace
trimTrgTrailingWS.description: Maximum trailing whitespace characters to trim from target segments (-1 for default).

forceSegmentedOutput.title: Force Segmented Output
forceSegmentedOutput.description: Force output formats to show segmentation regardless of filter configuration.

overwriteSegmentation.title: Overwrite Existing Segmentation
overwriteSegmentation.description: Re-segment already-segmented text units, replacing previous segmentation.

deepenSegmentation.title: Deepen Existing Segmentation
deepenSegmentation.description: Keep existing segmentation but split segments further using the current SRX rules.

treatIsolatedCodesAsWhitespace.title: Treat Isolated Codes as Whitespace
treatIsolatedCodesAsWhitespace.description: Treat isolated inline codes as whitespace during segmentation.

doNotSegmentIfHasTarget.title: Skip Segmentation if Target Exists
doNotSegmentIfHasTarget.description: Do not segment text units that already have target content.

segmentSource.title: Segment Source Content
segmentSource.description: Segment the source content before alignment, overriding any existing segmentation

useCustomSourceRules.title: Custom Source Segmentation Rules
useCustomSourceRules.description: Use a custom SRX file for source segmentation instead of the built-in default rules

segmentTarget.title: Segment Target Content
segmentTarget.description: Segment the target content before alignment, overriding any existing segmentation

useCustomTargetRules.title: Custom Target Segmentation Rules
useCustomTargetRules.description: Use a custom SRX file for target segmentation instead of the built-in default rules

overwriteSameSource.description: Replace all existing TM entries that have the same source text as the imported entry

suffix.description: Marker text appended to the output filename to distinguish joined files from the original split parts.

partCount.description: The number of output files to create from one input document, split by roughly equal word count.

autoOpen.description: Automatically open the result file in the default application after completion

keepCase.description: Treat words with different casing as distinct tokens (e.g. 'Term' vs 'term')

removeSubTerms.description: Remove candidate terms that are sub-sequences of longer retained terms

sortByOccurrence.description: Sort output by occurrence count instead of alphabetically

useTerminologyAnnotations.description: Include terms from ITS Terminology annotations attached to text units

useTextAnalysisAnnotations.description: Include terms from Text Analysis annotation spans on source content

useStatistics.description: Find term candidates using frequency-based statistical analysis of word sequences

type.title: Type of Change
type.description: Select the kind of text modification to apply to each text unit.

addPrefix.title: Add Prefix
addPrefix.description: Add a prefix string at the start of each text unit.

prefix.title: Prefix Text
prefix.description: The prefix text to prepend to each text unit.

addSuffix.title: Add Suffix
addSuffix.description: Add a suffix string at the end of each text unit.

suffix.title: Suffix Text
suffix.description: The suffix text to append to each text unit.

applyToExistingTarget.title: Modify Existing Translations
applyToExistingTarget.description: Apply modifications also to text units that already have a translation.

addName.title: Append Item Name
addName.description: Append the name of each text unit at the end of its value.

addID.title: Append Extraction ID
addID.description: Append the extraction ID of each text unit at the end of its value.

markSegments.title: Mark Segment Boundaries
markSegments.description: Add '[' and ']' delimiters around segments within each text unit.

applyToBlankEntries.title: Modify Blank Entries
applyToBlankEntries.description: Apply modifications also to text units without text content.

expand.title: Expand Text
expand.description: Expand text length to simulate translation growth for UI testing.

script.title: Replacement Script
script.description: Script variant used for character replacement modes.

autoOpen.description: Opens the first HTML result file in the default browser after completion

genericCodes.description: Uses generic numbered tags (e.g. <1>...</1>) instead of original inline codes in the HTML report

target2Suffix.description: Suffix appended to the target language code for document 2 entries in TMX output

target3Suffix.description: Suffix appended to the target language code for document 3 entries in TMX output

document1Label.description: Label used in reports to identify the base translation

document2Label.description: Label used in reports to identify the second translation

document3Label.description: Label used in reports to identify the optional third translation

useDataLog.description: Appends average comparison scores to a tab-delimited log file after each run

conversionType.title: Conversion Direction
conversionType.description: Whether to un-escape (decode) or escape (encode) URI sequences.

updateAll.title: Escape All Extended Characters
updateAll.description: Convert all non-ASCII characters to URI escape sequences.

escapeList.title: Characters to Escape
escapeList.description: The set of characters to convert to URI escape sequences.

punctuation.title: Punctuation Types
punctuation.description: Punctuation categories to apply whitespace correction to, with full-width CJK to ASCII conversion.

whitespace.title: Whitespace Characters
whitespace.description: Unicode whitespace character categories considered during spacing adjustment.

countInBatch.description: Set word count annotation aggregated per batch.

countInBatchItems.description: Set word count annotation per batch item.

countInDocuments.description: Set word count annotation per document.

countInSubDocuments.description: Set word count annotation per sub-document.

countInGroups.description: Set word count annotation per group.

bufferSize.title: Text Buffer Size
bufferSize.description: Size of the internal text buffer used during word counting (0 for default).

autoOpen.description: Automatically open the result file after the process is complete.

validate.title: Validate Document Structure
validate.description: Perform DTD, W3C, or RelaxNG schema validation in addition to the well-formedness check.

useFoundDTD.title: Use DTD From Input Documents
useFoundDTD.description: Use DTD declarations found in the input documents for validation.

xsltPath.title: XSLT Template Path
xsltPath.description: Full path of the XSLT template to apply on input documents.

paramList.title: Template Parameters
paramList.description: Parameters passed to the XSLT template, one per line in name=value format.

useCustomTransformer.title: Use Custom Transformer
useCustomTransformer.description: Use custom XSLT transformer and XPath factory classes instead of JVM defaults.

factoryClass.title: Transformer Factory Class
factoryClass.description: Fully qualified class name of the TransformerFactory implementation to use.

xpathClass.title: XPath Factory Class
xpathClass.description: Fully qualified class name of the XPathFactory implementation to use.

passOnOutput.title: Pass Output to Next Step
passOnOutput.description: Pass the transformation output as the raw document for subsequent pipeline steps.

inputFileMarker.description: Marker text in input filenames used to identify and group split XLIFF files for joining.

outputFileMarker.description: Marker text used to generate the output filename(s) by replacing the input marker and index.

bigFile.title: Process Large Files
bigFile.description: Use a stream-based parser to handle very large XLIFF files that would not fit in memory with the default DOM parser.

fileMarker.title: File Marker
fileMarker.description: Marker string appended to generated filenames before the numeric counter (e.g. '_PART' produces 'file_PART1.xlf').

updateSDLTranslationStatus.title: Update WorldServer Translation Status
updateSDLTranslationStatus.description: Update translation_type and translation_status flags in <iws:status> elements (WorldServer XLIFF-specific).

restoreOriginalNames.title: Restore Original File Names
restoreOriginalNames.description: Use original file names for split output documents instead of generated numbered names.
